description: Create a multiprecision GitHub Actions workflow that runs on pushes to master and develop branches, pull requests, and on release events. The workflow should have a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs and utilizes multiple jobs with different Ubuntu environments (22.04 and 24.04) and compilers (g++, clang++). Each job should check out the repository, install necessary packages, clone a Boost repository, and run various tests with different compilers, standards, and test suites.
